name: PER_FLEX_SEGMENT_MAPPINGS
description: This table stores mapping between source flexfields to destination flexfields.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: This specifies the id for an enterprise

columns.Name: SOURCE_DFF_CODE
columns.Comments: This field holds the flexfield code of source mapping

columns.Name: SOURCE_CONTEXT_CODE
columns.Comments: This field holds the context code of source mapping

columns.Name: SOURCE_SEGMENT_CODE
columns.Comments: This field holds the segment code of source mapping

columns.Name: DESTINATION_DFF_CODE
columns.Comments: This field holds the flexfield code of destination mapping

columns.Name: DESTINATION_CONTEXT_CODE
columns.Comments: This field holds the context code of destination mapping

columns.Name: DESTINATION_SEGMENT_CODE
columns.Comments: This field holds the segment code of destination mapping

columns.Name: MAPPING_TYPE
columns.Comments: This field holds the mapping type

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
